meta.title: The F-15EX is becoming a SHIP-HUNTING powerhouse #f15 #f15ex #fighterjet
meta.description:
The F-15EX and F-15E are both being equipped with Lockheed Martin's AGM-158C LRASM... and that's a big deal. 

Stay on top of Defense News by subscribing to Sandboxx!
